generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/DTDFVocab"
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input I_M and torque output τ_M"
]
instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in the first vertical axis"
]
instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the first vertical axis"
]
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
]
instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox"
]
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current I_M"
]
instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]
instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]
instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque measurement data trace derived from motor current and model",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]
instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity measurement data trace from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]
instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current measurement data trace",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]
instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTooling
]
instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTooling
]
instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for permanent magnet synchronous motor dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]
instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for gear transmission and cycloidal gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]
instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]
instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]
instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]
instance AASMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata management",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance SysMLTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]
instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for metadata management",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control",
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]
instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossQuantification
]
instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model refinement",
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAnalysis, ModelRefinementAction
]
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization of simulated versus measured data",
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]
instance FrictionLossQuantification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantification of friction losses in the robot axis using white-box and black-box models"
]
instance DeviationAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of deviations between simulated and measured data for motion accuracy"
]
instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refinement of control algorithms based on deviation analysis to improve motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of simulated versus measured data"
]
instance FirstVerticalAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live sensor streams, but specific time intervals or update rates not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of sensor data (MQTT) processed through Simulink models, linked via Asset Administration Shells for traceability, with integrated dashboard visualization comparing measured and simulated friction behavior for the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated stage, capturing real-time operational data during robot operation to monitor friction changes due to wear or varying applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated and measured torque/velocity data; white-box and black-box models continuously updated with live data to improve accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for metadata and SysML for system modeling."
]
